snippet.title: THE PUNISHER Official Trailer (2026) Jon Bernthal
snippet.description:
Note: Any AUDIO claims impeded will be removed entirely and/or entire feature.
-- Marvel’s The Punisher returns with Jon Bernthal reprising his role as Frank Castle, the ruthless vigilante first introduced in Daredevil. This new 2026 continuation places Castle back into the center of a violent war between organized crime factions and covert government operations tied to his past.

Set after the events of The Punisher, the story explores Castle’s deeper descent into isolation while uncovering a conspiracy involving former military networks, black-ops contracts, and corrupt federal agencies. As he becomes a target himself, Castle is forced to confront both enemies and allies who no longer trust his methods.

With brutal close-quarters combat, grounded weapon realism, and a darker tone aligned with Marvel Studios’ street-level universe, this trailer showcases intense action sequences, tactical gunplay, and the psychological toll of Frank Castle’s war.

Starring Jon Bernthal alongside returning Marvel characters and new adversaries, The Punisher (2026) aims to re-establish the character as one of the most grounded and violent antiheroes in the MCU’s evolving street narrative.

THE PUNISHER Official Trailer (2026) John Bernthal

Enjoy advanced 4K Upscaling and HDR-10 mastering across future trailers. Stay tuned for more.

snippet.description:
Banjaare - Bairan
Bairan - Banjaare

✖ Follow Banjaare:
https://instagram.com/official_banjaare

🎤  Lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Ho, manne sambh-sambh rakhe tere jhanjhara ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi chhori bawle se hore
Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere, khaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen koni deti, haaye bairi tanhaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Instrumental]

[Verse 2]
Ho, maarya-maarya phire, dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi ke jeena banjaarе ka?
Khoya rahun yaad teri kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batue mеin rakhun teri sambh ke nishaaniyaan
Tere bina kaal horeya, theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram, dede saanson te rihaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Bridge]
Haan-aan, aan-aan
Haan-aan

[Verse 3]
Je tu thodi ghabraajya, meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re, main aa jaaunga
Todun duniya ki reet re, ke haar re, ke jeet?
Manne chahiye teri preet, main nibha jaaunga
Dekh, bawla banaagi, manne likhna sikhaagi
Haaye, noch-noch khaagi teri bairan judaai manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Aaj tai nibhaun jo si kasam thi khaayi manne
Zindagi saari ya meri tere lekhe laayi manne

Hoyu jathedaar phoola seyon akalli naalda 
Kamm laye jaangey kanoon sakht ton
Dand ditte jaangey akal takht ton
Kalyug vahno vaahni doud jauga 
Jaffi poun jagrawa nu lahore ayuga 
Hikk thok kehne a sure ayuga 
Dahdeyan dmalleyan da dor aauga........3x

Murh parne te pagga dihniyaa panjab nu 
Har dhoun jhukugi nishaan sahib nu 
Laike daang naal kohinoor taj aungey
Bahron chobra de bhre hoye jhaaj aungey 
Gutta te sarbh loh de karhe hongey 
Drawing room asle naal bhare hongey 
Raj laine jaane saddi koum kinga di 
Bordera te fouj hoyu nihang singha di 
Oye boond v ni dinde vicho sadde paaniya 
Har banda kanth karu panj baaniya 
Pairan thalle choudra jwani middugi 
Ghro ghri chulleya te degh rijjugi 
Jagngey chehre anna jor ayuga
Ik do ni khalsa crore auga 
Kyunki ajj de sme di vaddi lorh ayuga 
Dahdeyan dmalleyan da daur ayuga .....3x 

O do ghari dekh jihnu sher darje 
Honey kadd kirdaar naluye de argey 
Hun jadon hoyi honi jang end di 
Parhke turangey vaar banda singh di 
Jis vele yudh da biggal gajj geya 
Os wele dsangey ki time vajgeya
Hr maa da putt urha joorha sahmbuga 
Kesri te rang neela goorha sambhuga 
Aayu oho time jehda mitt hunda si 
Goreya de tera sadda ik hunda si 
Raj hona sadda saddey rule hongey 
Sikhi de sidhanta te school hongey 
Kdo kiwe hoya si birth dsangey 
Asal akali de arth dsangey 
Murhpey ghara nu jadon putt morhe te 
Din charey kharkhra firu ghorey te

Jamngey fer jagge jeoney varge
Raggi dhadhi jadon sikh raj goungey 
Charhtey de potrey jhe yaad aungey 
Kisse parsang lohri maghi sunage 
Deya singh dilbar dhadi sunage 
Sukhe jinde yodheya de mele laawage 
Bhai nirmal choley ali jaggo gawangey 
Raja oh nikamma jihda raj na rawe
Kaum kaahdi jihda raaj bhaag na rwe
Aisa jang dhillon likhi ke anand a jwe 
Sunke sareero looyi kandeya jwe 
Hor kinne likhngey tenu dekhke
Rakh tu purhainiya kalam ret ke 
Sach jadon likhe ithihaas hongey

snippet.description:
The trailer for The Amazing Digital Circus Episode 9: The Last Act has arrived, and it points to one shocking conclusion: Jax is the Final Boss. After the accidental deletion of Caine, the Circus has turned into a gray, glitchy wasteland. In this breakdown, we analyze the 96.7% proof that Jax is our ultimate antagonist. We dive into the psychological symbolism of the official "Last Act" poster, the Escher-inspired mind games, and the haunting flashbacks of Ribbit. Is Jax’s "Funny One" persona finally collapsing under the weight of his own trauma, or is something much darker taking control of the simulation?

snippet.title: Vampire Crawlers Challenged Me To Break The Game...
snippet.description:
Hello there ladies and gentlemen. This video is all about Vampire Crawlers an exciting new indie game that combines elements of a roguelike (Vampire survivors) and a card game (Slay The Spire). We explore this lovely pixel game's unique mechanics like deck building from levelling up as we navigate its challenging dungeons. But best of all today the developers of the game decided to challenge people to break the game on twitter so naturally I THE SPIFFING BRIT the worlds greatest and humblest of video game pro exploiters has decided to rise to the challenge and break this lovely indie game from the folks who made vampire survivors.

the game actually launches on steam in 9 days time and I wish the developers luck and much success as this is a fun demo! You can find the game here: https://store.steampowered.com/app/3265700/Vampire_Crawlers_The_Turbo_Wildcard_from_Vampire_Survivors/
The description is this: From the somehow triple-BAFTA‑winning creators of Vampire Survivors, Vampire Crawlers: the turbo wildcard from Vampire Survivors turns the snowballing thrill of Vampire Survivors into a turbo turn‑based, card‑driven BLOBBER with rogue-lite elements. Build busted decks, explore familiar dungeons from a new perspective, and unleash world‑ending combos. Either take your time and be tactical, or play turns as fast as you humanly can: the outcome is always accurate!


Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRHXUZ0BxbkU2MYZgsuFgkQ/join
Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/Spiffing

snippet.title: Aksomaniac - Amsham ft. M.H.R, Bhumi, Circle Tone (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
ചിത്രശലഭമാകാനും മേഘമാലകളാകാനും പാവയാകാനും 
പറവയാകാനും മാനാകാനും മനുഷ്യനാകാനും നിന്‍റെ 
ചുണ്ടിന്‍റെ മുത്തമാവാനും നിമിഷാർദ്ധം പോലുമാവശ്യമില്ലാത്ത ഗഗനചാരി...
ഈ ഭൂമുഖത്ത് അളവറ്റ സ്നേഹിക്കാനും,
ഓർമ്മകളില്ലാതെ അലയാനും ശപിക്കപ്പെട്ട നിശാശലഭം.

I am a wanderer cast out of heaven, formless; slipping into cloud, beast, or man as easily
as breath. I borrow faces, take any likeness, become the one you ache for. 
I arrive as warmth on your lips, a feeling that reaches you before it is known. 
I live on passing sweetness, tasting beauty without ever holding it. 
I am allowed to love without measure on this earth, yet I carry nothing forward. 
Every face dissolves, every touch fades. I remain bound to desire, denied its reciprocity, 
until the curse lifts after every lover has slipped beyond memory.

Pas vrai ?

Où est ton papa ?
Dis-moi où est ton papa ?
Sans même devoir lui parler
Il sait ce qui ne va pas
Ah sacré papa

Faire au moins mille fois que j'ai
Compté mes doigts, hey

Où t'es

Quoi, qu'on y croit ou pas
Y aura bien un jour où on n'y croira plus
Un jour ou l'autre on sera tous papa
Et d'un jour à l'autre on aura disparu
Serons-nous détestables ?
Serons-nous admirables ?
Des géniteurs ou des génies ?
Dites-nous qui donne naissance aux irresponsables ?
Ah dites-nous qui, tiens
Tout le monde sait comment on fait des bébés
Mais personne sait comment on fait des papas
Monsieur Je-sais-tout en aurait hérité, c'est ça
Faut l'sucer d'son pouce ou quoi ?
Dites-nous où c'est caché, ça doit
Faire au moins mille fois qu'on a
Bouffé nos doigts, hey

[Refrain]

Où t'es, où t'es où, papaoutai ?

[Post-Refrain]
Où t'es

Où est ton papa ?
Dis-moi où est ton papa ?
Sans même devoir lui parler
Il sait ce qui ne va pas
Ah sacré papa
Dis-moi où es-tu caché ? Ça doit

Il sait ce qui ne va pas

Compté mes doigts, hey

[Refrain]
Où t'es, papaoutai ?
Où t'es, papaoutai ?
Où t'es, papaoutai ?
Où t'es, où t'es où, papaoutai ?
Où t'es, papaoutai ?
Où t'es, papaoutai ?
Où t'es, papaoutai ?
Où t'es, où t'es où, papaoutai ?

//
English Translation (shortened):

[Verse 1]
Tell me where he comes from
At last I'll know where to go
Mommy says that when you look hard
You always find something
She says he's never very far away
He leaves very often for work
Mommy says, “Working is good”
Better than being in bad company
Right?

[Pre-Chorus]
Where's your dad?
Tell me where's your dad?
Without even having to talk to him
He knows what's wrong
Oh beloved dad
Tell me where you're hiding
I must've counted my fingers
At least a thousand times (Eh)

[Chorus]
Where are you? Dad, where are you?
Where are you? Dad, where are you?
Where are you? Dad, where are you?
Where are you, where are you? Dad, where are you?
Where are you? Dad, where are you?
Where are you? Dad, where are you?
Where are you? Dad, where are you?
Where are you, where are you? Dad, where are you?

[Verse 2]
May we believe it or not
There'll be a day we won't believe it anymore
One day or the other we'll all be dads
And from one day to the other we'll disappear
Will we be hateable?
Will we be admirable?
Just passing on genes or geniuses?
Tell us who gives birth to these irresponsible people?
Ah, tell us who?
Well? Everyone knows how to make babies
But no one knows how to make dads
Mr. Know-It-All must've inherited it, that's right
Maybe you need to wing it or something?
Tell us where they're hiding
We must've bitten our fingers at least
A thousand times

[Chorus]
Where are you? Dad, where are you?
Where are you? Dad, where are you?
Where are you? Dad, where are you?
Where are you, where are you? Dad, where are you?

Where are you? Where are you?

snippet.title: FUR vs NRG - VCT Americas Stage 1 - Week 1
snippet.description:
VCT Americas Stage 1 marks the next step in the race to Champions Shanghai, and the stakes could not be higher. Twelve teams, two groups, and only three spots on the line.

Group Alpha is fueled by one central clash. Brazil versus the Americas. LOUD, MIBR led by Aspas, and FURIA bring regional pride, while Leviatán and Cloud9 look to challenge them. G2 stands in the middle, ready to prove they still belong among the elite.Group Omega is shaped by pressure. NRG stand as the favorites, but KRÜ arrive ready to fight, and Envy reenters the spotlight with legendary names looking to prove they can still compete.

Only 3 teams will reach Masters London. Tune in to find out Americas representatives!
